name: oliverklee/feuserextrafields
description: Extra fields for TYPO3 frontend users and drop-in replacement for the removed FrontEndUser Core model

check:coverage:functional: find 'Tests/Functional' -wholename '*Test.php' | parallel --gnu 'echo; echo "Running functional test suite {}"; .Build/vendor/bin/phpunit -c Build/phpunit/FunctionalTests.xml --coverage-php=".Build/coverage/{}.cov" {}';
check:tests:functional: find 'Tests/Functional' -wholename '*Test.php' | parallel --gnu 'echo; echo "Running functional test suite {}"; .Build/vendor/bin/phpunit -c Build/phpunit/FunctionalTests.xml {}';

scripts-descriptions.check: Runs all dynamic and static code checks.
scripts-descriptions.check:coverage: Generates the code coverage report for unit and functional tests.
scripts-descriptions.check:coverage:functional: Generates the code coverage report for functional tests.
scripts-descriptions.check:coverage:merge: Merges the code coverage reports for unit and functional tests.
scripts-descriptions.check:coverage:unit: Generates the code coverage report for unit tests.
scripts-descriptions.check:dynamic: Runs all PHPUnit tests (unit and functional).
scripts-descriptions.check:php: Runs all static checks for the PHP files.
scripts-descriptions.check:php:cs-fixer: Checks the code style with the PHP Coding Standards Fixer (PHP-CS-Fixer).
scripts-descriptions.check:php:lint: Lints the PHP files for syntax errors.
scripts-descriptions.check:php:sniff: Checks the code style with PHP_CodeSniffer (PHPCS).
scripts-descriptions.check:php:stan: Checks the PHP types using PHPStan.
scripts-descriptions.check:static: Runs all static code checks (syntax, style, types).
scripts-descriptions.check:tests: Runs all PHPUnit tests (unit and functional).
scripts-descriptions.coverage:create-directories: Creates the directories needed for recording and merging the code coverage reports.
scripts-descriptions.fix: Runs all automatic code style fixes.
scripts-descriptions.fix:php: Runs all fixers for the PHP code.
scripts-descriptions.fix:php:cs: Fixes the code style with PHP-CS-Fixer.
scripts-descriptions.fix:php:sniff: Fixes the code style with PHP_CodeSniffer.
scripts-descriptions.phpstan:baseline: Updates the PHPStan baseline file to match the code.
scripts-descriptions.prepare-release: Removes development-only files in preparation of a TER release.
